title: rhododendron viscosum f. glaucum
intro: Rhododendron viscosum f. glaucum, also known as the sticky rhododendron, is a subspecies of Rhododendron viscosum, a flowering shrub native to eastern North America. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The plant's leaves and flowers are believed to have health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Rhododendron viscosum f. glaucum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, with the leaves and flowers being used in traditional herbal remedies.
